95 admission /ædˈmɪʃ.ən/ noun entrance into something

99 airplane /ˈɛərˌpleɪn/ noun a powered vehicle that flies through the air to its destination
5 airport /ˈɛr.pɔrt/ noun the place where you go to get on an airplane

49 bicycle /ˈbaɪ.sɪ.kl̩/ noun a vehicle with two wheels and pedals

35 caller /ˈkɔ.lɚ/ noun the person that is phoning you
